label: Stat part (fertility by gender and age)
description: Scales the stat by a gender-specific age curve, modelling fertility changes over a pawn's lifespan.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

maleFertilityAgeFactor.label: Male fertility age factor
maleFertilityAgeFactor.description: Curve mapping biological age to a fertility factor for male pawns.

femaleFertilityAgeFactor.label: Female fertility age factor
femaleFertilityAgeFactor.description: Curve mapping biological age to a fertility factor for female pawns.
